text:
The Mitsuhoshi Herb (ミツホシ‎草‎, Mitsuhoshi Kusa)‎ is a type of medicinal herb. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Overview

The Mitsuhoshi Herb is one of the four herbs that Ponzu requests for, in her sidequest. 

Item Description

A medicinal herb with three small flowers in bloom.

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

Ponzu asks the Hunter group for four different kinds of herbs and when they manage to retrieve them she thanks them and joins their group. 

References
